name: a prose-bound rule gains the architectural-content bundle in its enforced_by
command: GCS="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" ruby -ryaml -e 'found=false;ok=false;Dir[ENV["GCS"]+"/*/*.yaml"].each{|f|d=YAML.unsafe_load_file(f) rescue next;next unless d.is_a?(Hash);(d["rules"]||[]).each{|r|next unless r.is_a?(Hash)&&r["applies_to_prose"]==true;found=true;ok=true if Array(r["enforced_by"]).any?{|e|e.is_a?(Hash)&&e["bundle"]=="architectural-content"}}};STDERR.puts((found&&ok) ? "prose-bundle-bound" : "missing");exit((found&&ok) ? 0:1)'
